title: ESIC Hospital Tirunelveli Recruitment 2026 – Walk in for 25 Specialist, Senior Resident & Medical officer Posts
organization: Employees’ State Insurance Corporation (ESIC) Hospital, Tirunelveli
post_name: Full Time Specialist, Part Time Specialist, Senior Resident (3 Years), Medical Officer
short_info: ESIC Hospital Tirunelveli is recruiting 25 contractual doctor posts including Full Time Specialists, Part Time Specialists, Senior Residents (3 Years) and Medical Officers. Walk-in Interview on 01 June 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: Full Time Specialist: MBBS with PG Degree/Diploma in concerned specialty + 3 years experience after PG. Part Time Specialist: Same as above. Senior Resident (3 Yr): MBBS with PG Degree/Diploma in concerned specialty. Medical Officer: MBBS with 2 years experience (1 year in Gen. Medicine/Surgery).

selection_process: Selection will be done through Walk-in Interview. Candidates must report for registration between 9:00 AM to 10:30 AM on 01-06-2026. Final selection is based on interview performance
how_to_apply: This is a Walk-in Interview. No prior online application is required. Eligible candidates should directly report to the venue on the scheduled date.
important_instructions: This is purely contractual engagement. No claim for regular appointment. No TA/DA will be paid for attending the interview. Selected candidates must sign a contract agreement on Rs.100/- stamp paper. Private practice is not allowed. Engagement is initially for 1 year and extendable based on performance. All disputes subject to Tirunelveli jurisdiction.
